excerpt: Only he who pronounces this testament with sincere conviction receives this key and enters Paradise.
source_location_hint: Cosmological sections on intellect and paradise

excerpt: Therefore, the Messenger of Allāh stood nearest among all creation to the intellect. Thus it is proven: the Messenger of Allāh is the gate of Paradise.
source_location_hint: Proofs of the Messenger as gate of paradise

excerpt: The interpreters of these allusions have always been the Successors (al-awṣiyāʾ). When they illuminate the reality of these hints through taʾwīl, the door opens and the seeker finds tranquility.
source_location_hint: On the role of awṣiyāʾ in exegetical unveiling

excerpt: Once they had acquired this knowledge, he commanded them to divide the earth into four regions and observe in which parts the proof of Allāh dwelt.
source_location_hint: On the use of astronomical knowledge to locate the Imām

excerpt: The secrets of our Prophet (peace and blessings upon him), which were disclosed on the Night of the Ascent (Laylat al-Miʿrāj).
source_location_hint: On mystical knowledge transmitted in the Miʿrāj

excerpt: Both of these stations belong exclusively to Muḥammad and ʿAlī (upon them be peace), for prophethood and the Wilāyah belong to them alone.
source_location_hint: On the exclusive stations of Muḥammad and ʿAlī
